mapper.select:
select su.sys_id, su.user_id , su.user_nm , su.plant_cd , sp.plant_nm from sys_user su left join sys_plant sp on sp.plant_cd = su.plant_cd where 1=1
and (su.user_id like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or su.user_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
and su.plant_cd = 'ADMIN' and su.delete_yn = 'N' and sp.delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user ( sys_id , user_id , user_nm , user_password , init_yn , password_fail_cnt , plant_cd , delete_yn, insert_user_id , insert_datetime, sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userNm}, #{item.userPassword}, 'N', 0, #{item.plantCd}, 'N', #{userId}, now(), #{sysPlantCd} )

update.foreach: update sys_user set user_nm = #{item.userNm}, plant_cd = #{item.plantCd}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and #{item.sysId}

delete.foreach: update sys_user set delete_yn = #{item.deleteYn}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and #{item.sysId}

mapper.select:
select count(*) > 0 from sys_user where 1=1 and user_id in
#{item.userId}

select su.sys_id, su.user_id , su.user_nm , su.password_fail_cnt , su.init_yn, su.plant_cd from sys_user su left join sys_plant sp on sp.plant_cd = su.plant_cd where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{item.sysId}
